games.name: flappy climate
games.description: The game is Flappy weather, you can play the flappy bird liked games , so this game also so fun and especially this game as one new thing is if you can hit the obstacles you can continue the game up to 3 lives . when the score is 10 greater the climate effects also changed. so much fun and addictive game . Thanking you.
games.instructions: In windows use mouse left click and android devices touch controls

games.name: BTC clicker
games.description: Click the Bitcoin and do upgrades like autoclicker and Bitcoin per click, and you have achievements like getting 100 Bitcoin , so what are you waiting for? Start clicking! :D
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Fun Farm For Kids
games.description: Fun Farm For Kids is an exciting and educational game designed especially for toddlers and preschoolers (ages 1.5 to 5). Your little ones will explore a colorful farm full of adorable animals, cheerful sounds, and creative activities! Key Features: Animal Sounds &amp;ndash; Tap on each animal to hear its real sound: cow, dog, duck, cat, horse, pig, sheep, and more! Drawing &amp;amp; Coloring &amp;ndash; Let your child unleash their creativity with easy-to-use drawing and coloring tools. Learn Colors &amp;ndash; Fun mini-games that teach kids to recognize and name basic colors. Realistic Sounds &amp;amp; Music &amp;ndash; High-quality sound effects and background music for an
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ball Cup Boom
games.description: Ball Cup Boom is a physics-based puzzle game where you must carefully pick up the ball using your mouse and guide it into the cup. Every level brings new obstacles and challenges to test your aim, timing, and hand-eye coordination. It&amp;rsquo;s simple to play, yet tricky to master. Enjoy satisfying win moments and keep improving your accuracy in this fun and casual HTML5 puzzle game made with GDevelop!
games.instructions: Mouse Left Button ndash Hold to pick the ball Drag ndash Move the ball Release ndash Drop it into the cup

games.name: Flap Hero
games.description: Flap Hero is a fast-paced arcade game inspired by the classic Flappy Bird. Fly through challenging red pipes with precise timing and quick reflexes. Its easy to play but hard to master!
games.instructions: Controls Tap Mobile Touchscreen Spacebar Keyboard Stay in the air dodge obstacles and become the ultimate Flap Hero

games.name: Defeat The Witch
games.description: You are a Castlevania soldier, and it is up to you to kill the witches in the castle and occupy the castle. Try to see how many levels you can reach. Just click to operate.

games.name: ZombsmiS
games.description: You are responsible for life and peace in a simulation village after a zombie apocalypse, you need to monitor your groups vital signs and prevent the wall from falling, sometimes your villagers can make decisions themselves. Just Simulate! How long can you hold out?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: tic tac toe html
games.description: Enjoy a classic game of Tic Tac Toe, now available in HTML! Challenge your friends or play against the computer in this simple yet addictive game. With an easy-to-use interface, its perfect for all ages. Test your strategy and see if you can win before your opponent!
